subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God! In this very moment the effulgences of mercy from the Lord of all worlds have shone forth from the Most Exalted Horizon upon a darkened world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله این حین تجلیات رحمت رب العالمین از افق اعلی اشراق نموده و عالم ظلمانی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
